title: Backrooms Liminal first slice
hook: You are trapped in a sickly yellow corridor maze; find the humming fuse, power the exit, and return before fear peaks.

first_slice.one_goal: Collect the fuse and return to the exit door.
first_slice.primary_action: Move through the corridor and press E near interactable objects.
first_slice.secondary_action: Toggle flashlight with F to spend battery for safer sight and lower fear pressure.

player_verbs.rule: Player moves in first-person through a bounded corridor; sprint is intentionally omitted in the first slice.
player_verbs.feedback: Head-bob, wall parallax, changing light pools, objective distance changes.
player_verbs.risk: Moving away from the exit increases fear pressure and makes return timing matter.

player_verbs.rule: Flashlight brightens the center corridor and slows fear rise while draining battery.
player_verbs.feedback: Visible cone, brighter wallpaper, battery meter changes.
player_verbs.risk: Battery can run low; darkness increases fear faster.
player_verbs.blocked_state: If battery is empty the flashlight flickers off.

player_verbs.rule: Near the fuse, E collects it; near the exit with fuse, E wins the slice.
player_verbs.feedback: Objective text changes, fuse glow disappears, exit light powers up, shadow pressure starts.
player_verbs.risk: After the fuse, fear rises faster and a silhouette appears behind the player.
player_verbs.blocked_state: Using too far from a target shows a short hint instead of changing state.

loop_chain.action: Read objective, exit marker, and distant fuse glow.
loop_chain.consequence: Player commits to moving away from safety.
loop_chain.visible_change: Distance to fuse decreases and lights flicker more strongly.
loop_chain.next_decision: Spend flashlight battery or save it.

loop_chain.action: Press E at the humming fuse.
loop_chain.consequence: Fuse is collected and exit becomes powered.
loop_chain.visible_change: HUD objective changes, fuse state turns on, corridor darkens behind.
loop_chain.next_decision: Return to the exit under fear pressure.

loop_chain.action: Move back to the exit and press E.
loop_chain.rule_check: Fuse found and distance to exit <= interaction radius.
loop_chain.visible_change: Exit glow fills the corridor and HUD says escaped.
loop_chain.next_decision: Replay for a cleaner route or lower fear.

failure_and_recovery.feedback: The corridor goes dark and the player is returned to the start.
failure_and_recovery.recovery: Reset state with lesson text; flashlight/battery choices matter on the next run.

progression.reason_to_repeat: Beat the route with lower fear and more battery, then later expand into randomized corridor choices.

observed_facts: Backrooms are usually portrayed as empty, liminal, extradimensional interior spaces.
Iconic visual grammar includes yellow walls, carpet, drop ceilings, and fluorescent lighting.
Fear comes from isolation, repetition, spatial wrongness, hum, and unseen threat.
avoid: direct recreation of a specific fan video
